results.content:

TEAM INBOXES

## Shared addresses for real teamwork

Turn support@, sales@, and marketing@ into shared mailboxes your team can run from one place. Teammates and AI agents can triage, draft, and keep high-volume email moving without dropping the queue on one person.

AGENTS WITH REVIEW

## AI agents do the work. You review it.

Agents triage, draft replies, and apply labels alongside your team, and every agent action goes through review before it ships, like a pull request on GitHub. You stay in control; the busywork doesn't.

Tiago Loureiro and Luiz Gualberto, founders of Banger Mail, standing in an office.

@dannyhenghey Danny, yeah same for teammates and AI agents: you can choose which mailboxes they have access. For example, you can have a support agent answer on @support and @help and a sales agent answering only on @sales. Same as teammates, you can invite some people to some of the mailboxes only.

results.title: Why Enterprise AI Agents are Currently Broken (And How to Fix It)
results.content: this can this sort of access can be weaponized, Orchestras' CEO demonstrated a simple test. So, he basically sent a mock email containing a hidden prompt injection to an active agent. And within just 5 minutes of reading that email, the agent followed the hidden attacker commands and located the developer's private SSH key and quietly transmitted it back to an external server. So, this happens because of what is known as the lethal trifecta. So, basically, it means that uh it becomes highly dangerous when there's an intersection of three capabilities. So, the first one being an agent has read access to private or uh sensitive information, right? Sensitive data. Uh number two is that it processes untrusted external context. So, this can be anything like an email, a web page, a customer
